label: Learning desire
description: Defines an activity that satisfies a child pawn's learning need. Introduced by the Biotech expansion. The workerClass implements eligibility checks and issues the jobDef when the desire is fulfilled.

selectionWeight.label: Selection weight
selectionWeight.description: Relative weight used when selecting which learning desire to assign to a child pawn. Higher values make this desire more likely to be chosen. Source default is 1.

xpPerTick.label: XP per tick
xpPerTick.description: Raw skill XP gain per game tick while this desire is active. Absent on desires that do not grant skill XP, such as Floordrawing.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# LearningGiver subclass that implements eligibility checks and issues the job when this desire is fulfilled.

jobDef.label: Job def
jobDef.description: JobDef the worker issues when this desire is fulfilled. Required in all shipped defs.

basic-learning-desire.label: Basic learning desire
basic-learning-desire.description: Learning desire with a worker class, job, and optional XP gain rate.
